titleStmt.title: SII 10.755: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 755. (A.R. No. 373 of 1905.) ON A ROUND PILLAR IN THE ĀSTHĀNA-MAṆḌAPA OF THE TEMPLE OF LAKSHMĪNARASIṀHA, SIṀHĀCHALAM, VIZAGAPATAM TALUK, VIZAGAPATAM DISTRICT. Ś. 1526. (Krōdhi)

summary.p: Records the grant of the village of Narava with all its belongings to the temple of god Nṛisiṁha at Siṁhādri, by Sarvappa Aśvarāya, son of Kamaḷaya of Vipparla-gōtra and Padmanāyaka-kula. Aśvarāya is stated to have subdued the country consisting of Koppulavāni-koṭṭam, Vīragoṭṭam and Yaṟajerla and repelled Mukunda Bāhubalindra under the orders of Muhammad Quli Qutb Pādśhāh.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāma svasti śrī jayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavarṣaṁbbulu 1526 Agu nēṭi krōdhināma
saṁvatsara kārttika śu 2 Ā hajarati mahamada khulli kutubupādaśahā voḍayalu
ṁgāri paṁppuna Aśvarāyaniṁgāru koppulavārikoṭhāmu vīragoṭhāmu
yarrajarllalu sādhiṁcci mukuṁddabahubaḷīṁdrunini sarahaddu
veḷla darimi kūrmmamu vacci kūrmmayasvāmiki vaiṣṇavulaku brāhmalaku sarvamā
nyamugā yicci śiṁhvādriki vacci pūrvamu siṁhvādrināthuniki nitya naivē
dyālu rāgabhōgālu sāgiṁcci vuṁḍaṁgānu Āmadya konnāṁḍlu khilamai pōtēnu
Āvenaka mukuṁdadēvumahārāju sāgiṁcenu yīvenaka mari nalubhayi yēṁḍla
baṭṭi sāgaka vuṁḍaṁgānu padmanāyakulu vipparllagōtrulu rājādhirājamahā
rāja rājaśrī kamaḷayaṁgāri putṛlu sarvappa Aśvarāyaniṁgāru śihvādri nṛśihvu
ni nityanaivēdyālu tiruvaḷikalu rāgabhōgālaku krōdhināmasaṁvatsara mṛgaśirasālu
modalugānu naravagrāmamu Āgrāmamu phalavṛkṣālu tōṁṭalu pōlaṁ meraka pallālu
ceruvulu grāmakaṇṭhālu sahitaṁ samastamunnu sarvamānyamugānu samarppaṇacēsiri
svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphala
ṁ bhavēt Ēkaiva bhaginī lōkē sarvēṣā mēva bhūbhujāṁ na bhōjyā na karagrāhyā dēva
dattā vasuṁdharā
illegible
Digital edition of SII 10.755 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
